sections.paragraph:
Original: מתרדת

Transliteration: mithredâth

Phonetic: mith-red-awth'

BDB Definition:

Mithredath = "given by Mithra"
  1. treasurer of king Cyrus of Persia
  2. a Persian officer stationed at Samaria in the time of Artaxerxes

Origin: of Persian origin

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
